title: woof cartography freshness stamp
description: Mechanical-layer staleness stamp at .woof/codebase/freshness.json (ADR-004). Written by the consumer's scripts/refresh-cartography on every post-commit refresh. The stamp is gitignored and regenerated per commit. `woof preflight` treats `ts` (wall-clock now minus this timestamp) as the authoritative production staleness signal, because the static `age_s` written at generation stays frozen once commits stop while `ts` keeps ageing.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the stamp was written. Authoritative production staleness signal: preflight derives age as now minus ts and warns past the declared staleness_floor_hours.

git_ref.description: Git ref (HEAD commit) the mechanical layer was generated against, or 'unknown' when HEAD cannot be resolved.

age_s.description: Age of the mechanical layer in seconds at generation time. The generator writes 0 (just regenerated); it does not advance once written. Used only as a deterministic preflight fallback when ts is absent or unparseable.

generator_version.description: Version of the refresh-cartography generator that produced this stamp, so stamps from an older composition can be detected.
